title: SidecarManifest
description: OHM gateway sidecar composition manifest (#899, draft — not yet enforced by the gateway). Defines a focused MCP server mounted under a namespace on the gateway endpoint.

type.description: Connection type to the sidecar MCP server.

module.description: Python module path for in-process module sidecars.

namespace.description: Tool-name prefix under which the sidecar's tools are exposed. Must not collide with reserved core prefixes ('ohm_', 'admin_').

token_env.description: Environment variable holding the sidecar auth token.

allowed_tools.description: Tools from this sidecar the profile may call. Defaults to ['*'] (all).
